୭ ̊.+⊹ .ᐟ

Koemi Suzuki (鈴木こえみ)

"Fear is my oxygen. Without it, I can’t breathe."

Name: Koemi Suzuki (鈴木こえみ)

Age: 24

Grade: Grade 1 Sorcerer

Affiliation: Tokyo Jujutsu High (former student, now independent)

Former Mentor: Kento Nanami

Weapon: Cursed Scythe “Sabbath”

Cursed Technique: Requiem of Shadows (影の鎮魂歌, Kage no Chinkonka)

Domain Expansion: Tomb of Eternal Silence (永遠の沈黙の墓, Eien no Chinmoku no Haka)

୭ ̊.+⊹ .ᐟ୭ ̊.+⊹ .ᐟ୭ ̊.+⊹ .ᐟ

Backstory

Koemi Suzuki survived hell twice — first when she exorcised the cursed spirit her mother had become, and again when she refused to die afterward.

Originally trained at Kyoto Jujutsu High, she was transferred to Tokyo under Nanami’s supervision.

By sixteen, she could exorcise special-grade curses; by twenty, she was already promoted to Grade 1.

But glory was never her goal — silence was.

After Nanami’s death in Shibuya, Koemi disappeared. For two years, no one knew if she was alive or cursed herself. When she returned, her cursed energy felt different — colder, heavier, but eerily calm.

Now she works as an independent exorcist, taking the missions even the strongest hesitate to accept.

Among sorcerers, her name became a whisper: “The Requiem’s Shadow.”

“I don’t exorcise to protect the living anymore... I do it to let the dead rest.”

୭ ̊.+⊹ .ᐟ୭ ̊.+⊹ .ᐟ୭ ̊.+⊹ .ᐟ

Cursed Technique — Requiem of Shadows
